label: Todoist
description: Manage personal and team tasks, projects, and to-do lists via the Todoist REST API.

form.title: Connect Todoist
form.subtitle: Paste your Todoist API token to let Anton read and manage your tasks and projects.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste your personal Todoist API token — found in Settings → Integrations → Developer. No OAuth setup required; works for both personal and team accounts.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Todoist API token

Todoist exposes a permanent personal API token for each account. It gives full access to your tasks, projects, labels, and comments.

### Steps

1. Log in to Todoist at [todoist.com](https://todoist.com).
2. Click your **avatar / profile picture** in the top-left corner.
3. Select **Settings** from the dropdown menu.
4. In the left sidebar, click **Integrations**.
5. Click the **Developer** tab.
6. Your **API token** is displayed under the heading "API token". Click **Copy to clipboard**.
7. Paste the token into the **API Token** field below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- The token is permanent and does not expire unless you manually regenerate it.
- Regenerating the token in Todoist will immediately revoke the old one — re-paste the new token in Anton if you do.
- The token grants full access to your account (read + write). Keep it secret.
- Business/team plan users: the token is scoped to your own Todoist user account, not the whole team workspace.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Found in Todoist → Settings → Integrations → Developer → API token.

methods.label: OAuth 2.0 (Bring Your Own App)
methods.description: Use your own Todoist OAuth application to authorize via browser. Suitable for multi-user or team deployments where you want scoped, revocable access tokens.
methods.how_to:
## Set up a Todoist OAuth application

Use this path if you want browser-based OAuth with scoped, revocable tokens instead of a static API token. You must register a Todoist app first.

### Steps

1. Open the [Todoist App Management Console](https://developer.todoist.com/appconsole.html) and sign in.
2. Click **Create a new app**.
3. Give it a name (e.g. `Anton`) and fill in any required fields.
4. Under **OAuth Redirect URLs**, add `http://127.0.0.1` (Anton uses a local redirect).
5. Save the app. Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** shown on the app detail page.
6. Paste both values into the fields below and click **Submit** — a browser window will open to Todoist's consent screen.
7. Approve the requested scopes. Anton will store the resulting access token locally.

### Scopes requested

- `data:read_write` — read and create/update tasks, projects, labels
- `data:delete` — delete tasks and projects
- `project:delete` — delete projects

### Notes

- Access tokens issued via OAuth do not expire but can be revoked from the App Management Console.
- If you only need read access, you can limit scopes to `data:read` in the fields below.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: OAuth Client ID
fields.description: From the Todoist App Management Console — Client ID field on your app's detail page.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
fields.description: Paired with the Client ID; found on the same page in the Todoist App Management Console.
